Most defenses help. Hawaii doesn’t.

They stay home. They guard ball screens 2-on-2. They dare you to score unassisted.

It’s produced one of the best mid-major defenses in the country.

That’s only happened four times in college basketball history — total.

Purdue... 
- takes the 3rd longest twos of any high-major (per the new KP stat)
- runs an intricate set play on most possessions
- has the most efficient O in country

For years, Villanova was every coach's go-to example of playing off 2 feet

But the lesser known fact was that they rarely shot floaters -- finishing dead LAST in floater volume for 6 (!!) years in a row

Yesterday's video on the “no floater” philosophy https://t.co/RBdfihD5P6
